recommendations.title: Battle of Los Angeles
recommendations.overview: In February 1942 US forces engaged an unidentified flying object above Los Angeles. Now almost 70 years later, the alien invaders have returned.

recommendations.title: Krull
recommendations.overview: A prince and a fellowship of companions set out to rescue his bride from a fortress of alien invaders who have arrived on their home planet.

recommendations.title: Transformers: Rise of the Beasts

recommendations.title: Eternals
recommendations.overview: The Eternals are a team of ancient aliens who have been living on Earth in secret for thousands of years. When an unexpected tragedy forces them out of the shadows, they are forced to reunite against mankind’s most ancient enemy, the Deviants.

recommendations.title: Terminus
recommendations.overview: Following a near-fatal accident, David Chamberlain makes an unprecedented discovery that will not only determine the fate of his family, but of mankind.

recommendations.title: We Can Be Heroes
recommendations.overview: When alien invaders capture Earth's superheroes, their kids must learn to work together to save their parents - and the planet.

recommendations.title: Avengers: Age of Ultron
